info.name: Hadha.co Backend API
info.description:
Production-ready Postman Collection auto-generated from Hadha.co FastAPI backend source code. Covers all 135 routes across 27 modules. Uses collection variables for ID chaining and per-request auth overrides.

Setup:
1. Set access_token = your Supabase JWT
2. Set admin_access_token = admin user JWT
3. Set super_admin_access_token = super_admin JWT
4. Run 'Verify Token' to populate user_id
5. Follow End To End Flow folders for guided journeys.

request.description: Send Supabase JWT as Bearer. No body. Saves user_id.
Replace slug in URL path with the actual product slug.

request.description: X-Session-ID for guest, Bearer for logged-in user.

item.name: Merge Guest Cart into User Cart

request.description: Merges guest cart into authenticated user cart. Requires both Bearer token and X-Session-ID.
Adds if absent, removes if present.
Returns razorpay_order_id, amount_paise, key_id. Saves payment_id.
All three Razorpay fields come from the Razorpay checkout callback.
amount: null for full refund, or partial amount.
Public shipment tracking by AWB/waybill number.
Returns HTTP 302 redirect to a signed PDF download URL. Postman will follow the redirect automatically.

request.description: Returns XML sitemap. No JSON response — Content-Type: application/xml.
delta: positive=add, negative=remove. movement_type will be adjustment.
event_type examples: product_view, search, cart_add, checkout_start. Auth optional.
is_internal: true = internal note (not visible to customer).
Toggle a feature flag. Only complimentary_gift_enabled is actively enforced.
Returns today_orders, today_revenue, new_customers_today, pending_orders, open_support_tickets, unresolved_fraud_signals, low_stock_products.

header.description: HMAC-SHA256 of request body using RAZORPAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET

request.description: Razorpay sends this webhook. Signature must match RAZORPAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET.
Checks DB and Redis connectivity. Returns 200 if healthy, 503 if degraded.
Always returns { status: alive } if server is running.
Step 1: Set access_token variable, then verify token. Saves user_id.
Returns razorpay_order_id and amount_paise. Use these in Razorpay checkout SDK.
